_meta.description: Operator-verified facts about countries. Injected into pair intelligence prompts as the highest-authority source. Use this to correct or supplement archive data that is stale or missing pre-window context.
_meta.instructions: Each entry should be operator-verified (via trusted news source, primary document, etc.). If you do not know a fact, leave the field out — do not guess. The 'verified' flag indicates whether the entry has been manually reviewed.
_meta.sync: Keep this file in sync with ../newsCountryIntelligence/src/country_facts.json

Iran.currentLeadership: Supreme Leader: Mojtaba Khamenei (appointed 2026-03-08 by the Assembly of Experts following the death of his father, Ali Khamenei, on 2026-02-28 in an Israeli airstrike on the Tehran compound). President: Masoud Pezeshkian.

activeConflicts.name: Iran-Israel War
activeConflicts.trigger: Israeli airstrike on Ali Khamenei's Tehran compound on 2026-02-28, killing the Supreme Leader. Preceded by months of covert sabotage and an Israeli assessment that Iran was near nuclear breakout.
activeConflicts.currentStatus: Active. Fragile ceasefire attempts brokered by Pakistan. US naval blockade on Iranian oil ports ongoing. Multiple nuclear sites degraded by US-Israeli strikes. Hezbollah and Houthis drawn in as proxies.

Israel._note: Operator should verify and expand — currently only contains war-start context derived from the Iran entry.

activeConflicts.name: Iran-Israel War
activeConflicts.trigger: Israeli preemptive airstrike on Iran on 2026-02-28, targeting Ali Khamenei's compound (killing the Supreme Leader) and Iranian nuclear facilities.
activeConflicts.currentStatus: Active. Multi-front: Iran (direct), Hezbollah (Lebanon ceasefire fragile), Houthis (drone/missile strikes from Yemen). Ceasefire efforts brokered by Pakistan and US.
